prompt_task: I got a scATAC-seq fragment file (unknown.shift.frag.bed.gz) from a colleague who aligned it to the hg38 genome. However, they applied a non-standard shift to the reads instead of the typical +4/-5. Can you help figure out what it is? Report answer in the format "3;-3" (corresponding to values for 5' and 3' ends). Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
